engine.name: AJ-V6 (Ford Duratec 25)
engine.spark_plug_torque: 15 Nm — CRITICAL: do not overtighten, aluminium heads
engine.intake_manifold_tuning: IMT valve with vacuum-operated runner flaps
engine.pcv_system: PCV valve on Bank 1 valve cover, breather hose to intake
engine.ecm_location: Engine compartment, front bulkhead, RH side

transmission.tcm_location: Transmission top, integral with valve body
transmission.drain_interval: Every 60,000 km / 40,000 miles — NOT lifetime fill despite Jaguar claim
transmission.towing_limit: Max 0.8km at 50km/h with front wheels on ground
transmission.adaptive_learning: TCM learns driving style — reset adaptives after fluid change with scanner
transmission.limp_mode_gear: 3rd gear only when limp mode activated
transmission.weak_point: Shift Solenoid C (controls 2-4 shifts) — most common failure
transmission.notes: Cold-start limp mode that clears when warm = early solenoid failure sign

drivetrain.haldex_fluid: Haldex AOC fluid — change every 60,000 km
drivetrain.rear_diff: Open differential (no limited-slip), integral with Haldex unit
drivetrain.propshaft: Two-piece with centre bearing (known wear item)
drivetrain.ptu_location: Mounted to transmission rear, feeds propshaft
drivetrain.ptu_drain_plug: NO drain plug — vacuum extraction required through filler port
drivetrain.ptu_notes: Known weak point. Factory "sealed for life" claim is false. Fluid degrades rapidly in Australian heat. Service every 50,000 km.
drivetrain.cv_boots: Inner and outer CV joints on front halfshafts — inspect for splits

brakes.bleed_order: RR → LR → RF → LF (furthest from master first)
brakes.abs_module_location: Behind battery / engine compartment, RH side
brakes.abs_variants: ABS only / ABS+TC / Dynamic Stability Control (DSC)
brakes.dsc_inputs: Steering angle sensor, yaw rate sensor, 4x wheel speed sensors, brake pressure sensor

suspension.front: MacPherson strut, lower wishbone, anti-roll bar
suspension.alignment_conditions: All fluids full, full fuel tank, tires at normal pressure
suspension.rear_toe_adjustment: Cam bolts on rear lower arms — 115 Nm final tightening ON WHEELS
suspension.front_toe_adjustment: Tie rod end rotation — locknut 40 Nm

electrical.parasitic_draw_problem: 200mA+ indicates fault — check GEM sleep mode
electrical.ecu: Ford EEC-V (PCM located behind glovebox on X-Type, but ECM in engine bay on V6)
electrical.can_bus_powertrain: 500 kbaud, ISO 11898, two-wire twisted pair, 120Ω termination
electrical.pats: Passive Anti-Theft System — key transponder through instrument cluster
electrical.gem_functions: Interior lighting, door locks, battery saver, SCP network gateway
electrical.instrument_cluster_role: CAN/SCP network gateway — bridges powertrain and body networks

tires_wheels.pressure_loaded: 2.4 bar (35 PSI) front and rear when fully loaded
